use_cases: Creates animated gradient dot backgrounds for landing pages and hero sections
Adds colorful hexagonal dot patterns to website backgrounds
Serves as decorative animated layer behind content cards
Provides dynamic color-cycling visual effects for marketing sites
Enhances portfolios and creative website designs with subtle motion
ai_summary: A decorative background component featuring an animated hexagonal dot pattern with cycling rainbow gradients. Uses CSS radial gradients combined with Framer Motion for smooth hue-rotate and position animations, creating a vibrant, colorful visual effect. Designed as a background layer for hero sections, landing pages, cards, or any area needing animated visual interest without distracting from foreground content.
